guild.name: Wave Improvement Cord! | Loot & Surge Routes & Tips & Tricks

messages.content:
Epic Games has now introduced a system where you need 14 tournaments played in the last 180 days to participate in FNCS. This is a protocol to reduce the amount of cheaters/hackers in the FNCS lobbies.

The best way to check if you have 14 tournaments played is by using Osirion. It has a feature where you can check how many tournaments you have played, and it's really simple and easy to use.

__How to use:__
1. Go to the web page https://osirion.gg/app/tournaments
2. Log into your epic games account
From here, you can see if you are eligible for FNCS.
